# Pull Request

## Summary

- Describe the change and why it matters.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Photoshop export flow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests/tooling

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual Photoshop/export check, if relevant

## Public Data Check

- [ ] No private PSD templates, real product images, customer data, tokens, shop credentials, or generated export artifacts are included.
- [ ] Screenshots/logs are sanitized.
- [ ] Any new public document belongs in README, docs, examples, FAQ, or contribution surfaces rather than internal launch planning.
